message:
Merge PR #1321: web: stop swallowing bd show failures in convoy fetcher

Changes getIssueDetailsBatch to return structured errors instead of silently
returning empty results. Adds tests for command failure, invalid JSON, and
successful parsing.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1321
Author: davidahmann
Co-authored-by: David Ahmann <dilmurat.personal@gmail.com>
